Author: Bancho
Name: Hrothgar Make Coin
Description: Automatically undercuts your retainer market board listings, with optional AutoRetainer post-venture integration. A rebrand/fork of Dagobert by SHOEGAZEssb.
Changelog: Auto-list now handles an item's NQ and HQ as separate entries, so you can whitelist both and each is priced against its own quality's market. Fixes a bug where typing a Max price could silently wipe an item's Min price floor. The market board price is now matched to the item it was requested for, so a slow reply can't be posted as the next item's price. Sliders take a double-click to type an exact value, and the price check wait now defaults to 2000ms (HQ needs the extra time to look past the NQ listings).

Author: Bancho
Name: Hrothgar Scent
Punchline: Hrothgar smell you. Hrothgar know who watching.
Description: A nearby-player list where every row shows whether that player is targeting you, with a watcher history and alerts.
Changelog: A performance patch. Recording nearby players no longer hitches when you zone into a crowd: the proximity log does its bookkeeping once per scan instead of once per player, and world and job names are cached rather than re-read every frame — the difference grows with the size of your recorded log. Opening several profiles in a row now paces its Lodestone requests, so a burst no longer trips the site's rate limiter and fails the lookups. No behaviour changes.
